---
title: "Segmentation"
output: html_document
date: "2025-08-25"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
setwd("/Users/danieltsai/Documents/DSTA 2025/Segmentation")
library(showtext)
showtext_auto()
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
library(readr)
library(pheatmap)
library(kableExtra)

library(cluster)
library(factoextra)
```

load data
```{r}
setwd("/Users/danieltsai/Documents/DSTA 2025/Segmentation")

members <- read_csv("members.csv")
sales <- read_csv("sales-2024.csv")
```

Question 1

1-1, 1-2
```{r}
# User-Item matrix
user_product <- sales %>%
  group_by(member_id, product) %>%
  summarise(qty = sum(quantity), .groups = "drop") %>%
  tidyr::pivot_wider(names_from = product, values_from = qty, values_fill = 0)

#Item Correlation matrix
product_matrix <- as.matrix(user_product[,-1])
cor_mat <- cor(product_matrix, method = "pearson")

#Heatmap
pheatmap(cor_mat, main = "Correlation Heatmap")

```

Question 2:

2-2
```{r}
set.seed(3567)

#Silhouette method
sil <- sapply(2:10, function(k){
  km <- kmeans(product_matrix, centers=k, nstart=20)
  ss <- silhouette(km$cluster, dist(product_matrix))
  mean(ss[,3])
})
plot(2:10, sil, type="b", xlab="K", ylab="Average Silhouette Width")

```
2-3
```{r}
# if #K =5 
set.seed(3567)
km_res <- kmeans(product_matrix, centers=5, nstart=25)

#Every member has a group
members_cluster <- members %>%
  left_join(data.frame(member_id=user_product$member_id, cluster=km_res$cluster), by="member_id")

head(members_cluster)
```
2-2
```{r}
sales_with_cluster <- sales %>%
  left_join(members_cluster %>% select(member_id, cluster),
            by = "member_id")

# Top 5 Products in every group
top5_products <- sales_with_cluster %>%
  group_by(cluster, product) %>%
  summarise(total_qty = sum(quantity), .groups = "drop") %>%
  arrange(cluster, desc(total_qty)) %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = total_qty, n = 5)

top5_products
```
```{r}
ggplot(members_cluster, aes(x = factor(cluster), fill = gender)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  labs(title = "Gender Proportion by Cluster",
       x = "Cluster", y = "Proportion") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent)
```
age distribution
```{r}
members_cluster <- members_cluster %>%
  mutate(age = as.numeric(difftime(Sys.Date(), as.Date(birthday), units = "days"))/365)

ggplot(members_cluster, aes(x = age, fill = factor(cluster))) +
  geom_histogram(bins = 30, alpha = 0.6, position = "identity") +
  labs(title = "Age Distribution by Cluster", x = "Age", y = "Count")

```
card level
```{r}
ggplot(members_cluster, aes(x = factor(cluster), fill = card_level)) +
  geom_bar(position = "fill") +
  labs(title = "Membership Tier Distribution by Cluster",
       x = "Cluster", y = "Proportion") +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::percent)
```
```{r}
# 性別比例
gender_tab <- members_cluster %>%
  count(cluster, gender) %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(cluster, gender, prop) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = cluster, values_from = prop) %>%
  mutate(Variable = paste0("Gender: ", gender)) %>%
  select(Variable, everything(), -gender) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ sprintf("%.3f", .)))

# 年齡 (平均 ± SD)
age_tab <- members_cluster %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  summarise(
    mean = mean(age, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd   = sd(age, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  mutate(value = paste0(round(mean, 1), " ± ", round(sd, 1))) %>%
  select(cluster, value) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = cluster, values_from = value) %>%
  mutate(Variable = "Age") %>%
  select(Variable, everything())

# 會員卡等級
card_tab <- members_cluster %>%
  count(cluster, card_level) %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  mutate(prop = n / sum(n)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  select(cluster, card_level, prop) %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = cluster, values_from = prop) %>%
  mutate(Variable = paste0("Card: ", card_level)) %>%
  select(Variable, everything(), -card_level) %>%
  mutate(across(where(is.numeric), ~ sprintf("%.3f", .)))

top3_products <- top5_products %>%
  group_by(cluster) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = total_qty, n = 3) %>%
  summarise(Top3 = paste(product, collapse = ", "),
            .groups = "drop") %>%
  mutate(Variable = "Top 3 Products") %>%
  pivot_wider(names_from = cluster, values_from = Top3) %>%
  select(Variable, everything())
# 合併
summary_tab <- bind_rows(gender_tab, age_tab, card_tab)
summary_tab2 <- bind_rows(summary_tab, top3_products)

kable(summary_tab2,
      format = "html",
      booktabs = TRUE,
      caption = "Cluster Profile with Top 3 Products") %>%
  kable_styling(full_width = FALSE,
                bootstrap_options = c("striped", "hover"))
summary_tab2 <- summary_tab2 %>%
  rename_with(~ paste0("Cluster ", .), -Variable)
summary_tab2
```
